chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 28 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.645/2024 (Ex./A) 2. For hearing of main case 11.03.2024 None present. No intimation is received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Accordingly, this transfer application is dismissed in non-prosecution along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
